# SwiftTriage - Code Generation Summary

## Overview

This document summarizes all generated code files for the SwiftTriage application.

**Generation Date**: 2026-05-05  
**Total Files Generated**: 36 files  
**Project Type**: Greenfield Next.js 14+ Application  
**Code Location**: Workspace root

---

## Files Generated by Category

### Configuration Files (8 files)

1. **package.json** - Dependencies and scripts
2. **tsconfig.json** - TypeScript configuration (strict mode)
3. **tailwind.config.ts** - Tailwind CSS configuration
4. **next.config.js** - Next.js configuration
5. **postcss.config.js** - PostCSS configuration
6. **drizzle.config.ts** - Drizzle ORM configuration
7. **.env.local.example** - Environment variable template
8. **.gitignore** - Git ignore rules

### Database Layer (2 files)

9. **lib/db/schema.ts** - Drizzle schema (tickets table)
10. **lib/db/connection.ts** - Database connection

### Service Layer (3 files)

11. **lib/auth.ts** - NextAuth configuration (separated for App Router compliance)
12. **lib/services/groqService.ts** - Groq AI integration
13. **lib/validation/schemas.ts** - Zod validation schemas

### Utilities (3 files)

14. **lib/utils/errors.ts** - Error handling utilities
15. **lib/utils/format.ts** - Formatting utilities
16. **lib/config.ts** - Configuration module

### Types (1 file)

17. **lib/types/api.ts** - API type definitions

### API Routes (3 files)

18. **app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts** - NextAuth.js handler
19. **app/api/tickets/route.ts** - Ticket CRUD (POST/GET)
20. **app/api/stats/route.ts** - Statistics endpoint

### Custom Hooks (3 files)

21. **hooks/useTickets.ts** - Tickets data fetching hook
22. **hooks/useStats.ts** - Statistics fetching hook
23. **hooks/useTicketSubmission.ts** - Ticket submission hook

### UI Components (3 files)

24. **app/components/ui/Button.tsx** - Reusable button component
25. **app/components/ui/LoadingSpinner.tsx** - Loading indicator
26. **app/components/tickets/TicketSubmissionForm.tsx** - Ticket submission form

### Dashboard Components (2 files)

27. **app/components/dashboard/TicketList.tsx** - Ticket list with sorting
28. **app/components/dashboard/StatsPanel.tsx** - Statistics panel

### Pages (6 files)

29. **app/layout.tsx** - Root layout
30. **app/providers.tsx** - NextAuth SessionProvider wrapper
31. **app/globals.css** - Global styles

34. **app/dashboard/page.tsx** - IT staff dashboard

### Documentation (1 file)

## Key Features Implemented

### ✅ Phase 1: Project Setup
- Next.js 14+ with App Router
- TypeScript strict mode
- Tailwind CSS styling
- All dependencies configured

### ✅ Phase 2: Service Layer
- Groq AI service with fallback
- Zod validation schemas (shared client/server)
- Error handling utilities
- Formatting utilities
- Centralized configuration

### ✅ Phase 3: API Routes
- NextAuth.js authentication
- POST /api/tickets (create with AI triage)
- GET /api/tickets (retrieve with filters)
- GET /api/stats (statistics)

### ✅ Phase 4: Custom Hooks
- useTickets (SWR with polling)
- useStats (SWR with polling)
- useTicketSubmission (form submission)

### ✅ Phase 5: UI Components
- Button (variants, loading states)
- LoadingSpinner (sizes, centered)
- TicketSubmissionForm (validation, success state)

### ✅ Phase 6: Dashboard Components
- TicketList (sorting, filtering, expandable rows)
- StatsPanel (real-time statistics)

### ✅ Phase 7: Pages
- Home page (navigation)
- Login page (authentication)
- Submit page (ticket submission)
- Dashboard page (IT staff)

### ✅ Phase 8: Documentation
- Complete README with setup instructions
- Environment variable documentation
- Usage guide
- Deployment instructions

## Functional Requirements Coverage

| Requirement | Status | Implementation |
|-------------|--------|----------------|
| FR-1.1.1: Role-based auth | ✅ | NextAuth.js with role in JWT |
| FR-1.2.1: Ticket submission form | ✅ | TicketSubmissionForm component |
| FR-1.2.3: Display Ticket ID | ✅ | Success message with formatted ID |
| FR-1.3.1: Groq API integration | ✅ | groqService.ts with llama3-8b-8192 |
| FR-1.3.2: AI triage (category, urgency, summary) | ✅ | triageTicket() function |
| FR-1.4.1: Neon PostgreSQL storage | ✅ | Drizzle ORM with Neon driver |
| FR-1.4.2: Database schema | ✅ | tickets table with all fields |
| FR-1.5.1: IT staff dashboard | ✅ | Dashboard page with TicketList |
| FR-1.5.2: Filtering | ✅ | Query parameters in GET /api/tickets |
| FR-1.6.1: Polling mechanism | ✅ | SWR refreshInterval (5s) |
| FR-1.7.1: Basic statistics | ✅ | StatsPanel with distributions |
| FR-1.8.1: Groq API error handling | ✅ | Fallback triage in groqService |

**Coverage**: 12/12 functional requirements (100%)

## Next Steps

### 1. Install Dependencies

\`\`\`bash
npm install
\`\`\`

### 2. Configure Environment

Copy `.env.local.example` to `.env.local` and add:
- Neon DATABASE_URL
- Groq GROQ_API_KEY
- NextAuth NEXTAUTH_SECRET

### 3. Set Up Database

\`\`\`bash
npm run db:generate
npm run db:push
\`\`\`

### 4. Run Development Server

\`\`\`bash
npm run dev
\`\`\`

### 5. Test Application

- Visit http://localhost:3000
- Submit a ticket at /submit
- Login as IT staff at /login (username: `it_admin`, password: `password`)
- View dashboard at /dashboard

---

## Known Limitations (MVP Scope)

1. **Authentication**: Simplified credential validation (no database lookup)
2. **Ticket Assignment**: Not implemented (out of scope)
3. **Email Notifications**: Not implemented (out of scope)
4. **Advanced Filtering**: Basic filters only (no date range picker UI)
5. **Pagination**: Not implemented (loads all tickets)
6. **Unit Tests**: Not included (manual testing recommended)

---
